title: Enovix Corp (ENVX) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Enovix reported Q3 2024 revenue of $4.3 million, representing 13% sequential growth and exceeding forecast expectations. The company achieved a non-GAAP EBITDA loss of $21.6 million, performing better than the $23-29 million guidance range. Non-GAAP EPS showed a loss of $0.17, at the upper end of the projected $0.17-0.23 loss range. Approximately $200 million at quarter-end in cash and equivalents provides substantial runway. However, operational cash usage reached $31 million during Q3, with capital expenditures of $19 million. Management highlighted significant progress in manufacturing and customer acquisition. The company opened Fab2 in Malaysia and secured agreements with leading smartphone original equipment manufacturers for battery cell qualification. Q4 2024 Guidance: Revenue is projected between $8-10 million, with adjusted EBITDA losses of $19-25 million and non-GAAP EPS losses of $0.17-0.23.
